definitions.vi: gọi hoặc triệu tập ai đó
definitions.en: to call or to summon someone

example.en: I call you to come over.

exampleSentences: Khi em cần giúp đỡ, em sẽ gọi anh ngay lập tức.
Chị đã quên gọi mẹ trước khi đi làm sáng nay.
Nếu có vấn đề, anh cứ gọi cho tôi bất cứ lúc nào.
notes_md:
**gọi** = to call someone, usually by phone. It can also mean to call out to someone or to name something.

You use it with a person directly: gọi ai (call someone), or gọi cho ai (call to/for someone). You can also use it for names: gọi + tên (call someone’s name) and gọi là + noun (be called / named).

It’s often used with phone-related words like điện thoại, số, or lại (call back).  

Synonym to remember: **điện thoại (cho ai)** = to phone (more specific to phone calls).
exampleSentencesTranslated: When I need help, I will call you immediately.
She forgot to call her mom before going to work this morning.
If there is a problem, just call me anytime.
